findings.title: Missing security header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Define a strict Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS and data-injection attacks (e.g. default-src 'self').

findings.title: Missing security header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.evidence: Header 'Strict-Transport-Security' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Enable HSTS ('Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains') to enforce HTTPS.

findings.title: Missing security header: X-Frame-Options
findings.evidence: Header 'X-Frame-Options' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Set 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'SAMEORIGIN' to prevent clickjacking.

findings.title: No account lockout detected after repeated failed logins
findings.evidence: 4 failed login attempts returned status 403 with no lockout indication.
findings.recommendation: Implement account lockout, CAPTCHA, or progressive delays after repeated failed login attempts to mitigate brute-force attacks.

findings.title: Missing security header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Set 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to stop MIME-type sniffing.

findings.title: Missing security header: Referrer-Policy
findings.evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Set a Referrer-Policy (e.g. 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin') to limit referrer leakage.

findings.title: Missing security header: Permissions-Policy
findings.evidence: Header 'Permissions-Policy' not found in response from http://testphp.vulnweb.com
findings.recommendation: Define a Permissions-Policy to restrict access to browser features (camera, geolocation, etc.).

findings.title: No SQL injection indicators detected
findings.evidence: Tested 1 parameter(s) with error/boolean-based payloads; no anomalies observed.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Continue using parameterized queries.

findings.title: No reflected XSS detected
findings.evidence: 12 GET/POST parameter+payload combinations tested with no unencoded reflection.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Continue to validate/encode all user input on output.

findings.title: No common information disclosure issues detected
findings.evidence: 12 known-sensitive paths tested; none returned exposed content.
